mainEntity.name: What if exposure happened at multiple jobs in Murray and North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What if exposure happened at multiple jobs in Murray and North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: File with last injurious exposure employer under Utah 'last exposure' rule; apportion benefits if multiple carriers liable.

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray/North Salt Lake multi-employer claims require payroll records from all sites. Commission apportions liability. Complex; attorney coordinates. Total benefits unchanged.

name: Multi-Employer Respiratory Exposure Claims
description: File with last injurious exposure employer under Utah 'last exposure' rule; apportion benefits if multiple carriers liable.
